title: Filter by API last_updated field

posts.author: shay.butran (shay butran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
there is a way to filter dates for column type last_updated via API?
query {
boards (ids:1352790395) {
items_page (limit: 100, query_params: {rules: {column_id: “last_updated_1”, compare_value: [“2024-01-01”], operator:greater_than}}) {
cursor
items {
id
name
updated_at
column_values {
id
text
}
group {
title
id
color
}
}
}
}
}

i want to do something like the request above.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @shay.butran,

The last_updated column only accepts two compare_values: "assigned_to_me" and the user ID as a string ("person-123456").

But I’ve created a feature request to maybe add this functionality at some point!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
